headline: Assessing Hormel Foods (HRL) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price And Return Weakness
summary: Why Hormel Foods is on investors’ radar today Hormel Foods (HRL) is drawing investor attention after a period where the stock has delivered negative total returns over the past year and past 3 months, prompting fresh questions about valuation and earnings power. See our latest analysis for Hormel Foods. At a share price of $21.55, Hormel Foods has seen a 1-month share price return of 6.5% decline and a year-to-date share price return of 7.9% decline. headline: Hormel Refocuses On JENNIE O As Turkey Asset Sale Reshapes Value
summary: Hormel Foods has completed the sale of its whole bird turkey business to Life-Science Innovations (LSI). The company will keep the JENNIE O brand and its value added turkey operations. The transaction reshapes Hormel's turkey production assets while keeping its branded turkey presence intact. For investors tracking NYSE:HRL, this shift comes as the stock trades at $21.55, with a return of 1.7% over the past week. Over longer horizons, the share price has seen declines of 6.5% over the past...
